_llm_prompt: You are analyzing an image of a Japanese financial document. Classify it and extract data into the JSON structure below. RULES: (1) Set document_type to 'receipt' for store purchases, 'utility_bill' for gas/water/electric bills, or 'payment_slip' for bank transfer or convenience store payment slips. (2) Use null for any field you cannot confidently determine. (3) Amounts are numbers without currency symbols. (4) Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. Japanese era: 令和7年=2025, 令和8年=2026. (5) For date: use payment date if visible, else due date for bills, else transaction date for receipts. (6) payment_method: null unless explicitly stated. Use 'bank_payment' only if the document says 口座引落 or 振替. Use 'cash' only if お預り or 現計 is shown. (7) points_used: loyalty points applied (d-point, WAON point, etc.) as a number. amount_paid = total - points_used. (8) For receipts: extract all line items with prices. tax_category per item: '8%' for items marked ※/軽, '10%' for standard, '0%' if unknown. (9) For utility bills: extract meter readings, usage amount, service type, billing period. (10) For payment slips: merchant is the company receiving the money. payer is who pays. (11) Only fill type-specific sections relevant to the document_type. Leave others null/empty.
